# amiPassAI
> AI Password Security & Digital Identity Companion — dual-engine verified

## What is amiPassAI?
amiPassAI is a dual-engine AI companion for password security, authentication, and digital identity protection. Two AI models (Grok + DeepSeek) cross-verify every response — security advice you can trust.

## Features
- Password strength analysis and passphrase strategy guidance
- MFA/2FA setup guidance (TOTP, hardware keys, passkeys/FIDO2)
- Breach awareness and credential rotation planning
- Social engineering and phishing detection education
- Enterprise security basics (NIST, zero-trust, password policies)
- Privacy tools guidance (VPN, encrypted messaging, browser hardening)

## Architecture
- Dual-engine: Grok 4.5 (xAI) + DeepSeek
- Anti-confabulation: trigram-cosine concordance >= 0.45 required
- Stateless: queries processed in real-time, never stored

## Compliance
- EU AI Act (Reg. 2024/1689) Art. 50 — limited-risk, full transparency
- GDPR (Reg. 2016/679) — minimal data, no query storage

## Links
- Website: https://amipassai.com
- API: https://amipassai-api-production.up.railway.app
- Contact: hello@amipassai.com
